title: Phyllorkis medusae
intro: Phyllorkis medusae, also known as the 'Medusa's Toadflax', is a species of orchid native to Asia and Australia. The health benefits of Phyllorkis medusae include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The bioactive constituents of Phyllorkis medusae include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. In traditional herbal medicine, Phyllorkis medusae is often prepared as a decoction or infused in hot water to make a tea, or dried and used as an herbal powder in capsules or tablets.
